market_question: Russia x Ukraine ceasefire by end of 2026?
question: Russia x Ukraine ceasefire by end of 2026?
evidence: Euronews (2026-03-10): US-brokered peace talks are ON HOLD as Washington focus shifts to Iran war. No active negotiating sessions scheduled.
Japan Times (2026-03-01): Russia explicitly conditioning talks on Ukraine ceding Donetsk region — a non-starter for Kyiv.
UN General Assembly resolution demanding immediate ceasefire passed but Russia not compliant and not bound (March 2026).
Historical base rate: Only 1 of the last 8 major state-vs-state conflicts with territorial disputes resolved via ceasefire within 9 months of active fighting — roughly 12%.
US diplomatic bandwidth entirely consumed by Operation Epic Fury (Iran war, Feb 28 start). Russia-Ukraine track explicitly deprioritized by Trump admin.

market_question: Will China invade Taiwan before GTA VI?
question: Will China invade Taiwan before GTA VI?
evidence: 2026 US Annual Threat Assessment (March 19): China has no fixed invasion timeline — not in 2026, not 2027
Operational preconditions absent: no carrier staging, no naval blockade positioning, no evacuation of ~300K Chinese nationals from Taiwan
Historical base rate: 0 invasions across 4 major cross-strait crises over 40+ years (1954, 1958, 1995-96, present)

market_question: Will OKC win the NBA Western Conference Finals?
question: Will OKC win the NBA Western Conference Finals?
evidence: Basketball-Reference playoff model: 62.3% YES
ESPN BPI implied probability: 64.1% YES
Vegas consensus (-125 ML): ~55.6% YES
OKC record: 56-15, #1 seed West, active 11-game win streak, +10.2 pts/game point differential

market_question: Will Bitcoin hit $1M before GTA VI?
question: Will Bitcoin hit $1M before GTA VI?
evidence: BTC at ~$87K requires an ~11x move in ~4 months — equivalent to adding ~$1.6T in new market cap. No asset class in recorded history has achieved this magnitude of appreciation in this time frame.
90-day realized volatility: ~60% annualized. Monte Carlo simulation at this vol level puts $1M before July 2026 probability well under 3%.
Market appears to be pricing lottery-ticket psychology — a documented behavioral bias in prediction markets where low-probability tail events are systematically overpriced.

market_question: Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by April 15, 2026?
question: Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by April 15, 2026?
evidence: CNBC March 25 2026: Iran rejected Trump's 15-point peace plan, issued counteroffer demanding Strait of Hormuz sovereignty — a US non-starter
Euronews March 25 2026: Iran escalated attacks on Israel and Gulf states on the same day as rejecting the plan
Resolution requires 14 consecutive days of zero qualifying military action starting by April 1 — only 7 days away while both sides are actively escalating

market_question: Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by April 30, 2026?
question: Iran x Israel/US conflict ends by April 30, 2026?
evidence: Bloomberg March 25 2026: "Iran Rejects US Peace Plan in Blow to Efforts to End War" — counteroffer includes Hormuz sovereignty, reparations, and US base closures
NPR March 25 2026: Iran's five stated conditions are incompatible with US red lines on every major point
Historical base rate: major US air campaigns rarely end within 5–7 weeks when the adversary is issuing escalatory counteroffers
Resolution requires a 14-day zero-action window starting by April 16 — 22 days from today

market_question: Will Netanyahu cease to be PM of Israel by Dec 31, 2026?
question: Will Netanyahu cease to be PM of Israel by Dec 31, 2026?
evidence: Netanyahu re-elected as Likud leader, targets Sept/Oct elections — preference for a late-year vote makes a Dec 31 exit extremely unlikely (Anadolu Agency, March 2026)
Corruption trial verdict not expected until 2027 — no conviction mechanism removing him in calendar 2026 (Wikipedia: Trial of Benjamin Netanyahu)
Israeli coalition formation historically takes 6–12 weeks minimum — Oct elections put a new PM in late Dec or Jan 2027 at best, likely missing the deadline (Chatham House, March 2026)
Budget passes (~55% prob) → Netanyahu controls timing → Oct elections → near-zero Dec 31 exit; if budget fails (~45%), June elections create a narrow but sub-50% exit path
Historical base rate: only 2 of last 5 Israeli PMs left office within 9 months of an active war or major escalation

question: Will Aston Villa win the 2025–26 UEFA Europa League?
evidence: Opta model: 26% to win outright (47% reach final × ~55% win rate from there)

At 34.5%, market is pricing Villa like a co-favourite; the math doesn't support it

market_question: Will the Iranian regime fall before 2027?
question: Will the Iranian regime fall before 2027?
evidence: Khamenei survived the Feb 28 assassination attempt — hardliners consolidated power, succession not disrupted
Mojtaba Khamenei installed as succession heir March 9, IRGC fully intact and loyal — institutional continuity secured
Washington Times, Al Jazeera, WaPo: no credible collapse indicators as of March 26
Manifold Markets independently prices ~26% — cross-platform crowd below Polymarket
Shorter June 30 horizon only 22.5% — even conflict-accelerated markets don't see regime fall as likely near-term
